results.title: Creatopy Reviews (2026) | Product Hunt
results.content:
•1 review

This tool exceeded my expectations time and time again. I have been using it for the past year, and I am extremely happy with it. What I appreciate most about this tool is that it's an all-in-one ad-making platform that allows you to create static or animated ads, generate sets of ads for all the major advertising platforms and social networks, and even publish your campaigns without leaving their platform. Plus, it's incredibly easy to grasp as it's got a super intuitive dashboard, which makes things easier for people like me with zero design background. And if you're part of a bigger team, you'll appreciate their team collaboration tools. I highly recommend it for its capabilities to create animated ads and to produce large sets of ads fast (with minimal human intervention). [...] #### What's great

results.title: AdCreative.ai Reviews (2026) | Product Hunt
results.content:
Instead of starting from scratch, I can quickly generate multiple creatives and test them right away. It’s especially useful when campaigns start to fatigue and you need fresh variations fast. Some outputs feel a bit generic, but a few are surprisingly good and only need minor tweaks before launching.

Overall, it’s a solid tool for saving time and scaling creative testing without relying too much on manual design work.

#### What needs improvement

There are a few areas that could be improved:

Some creatives feel repetitive if you generate multiple batches

Better control over brand voice and style would help

The scoring system doesn’t always match real performance

Would love to see stronger support for video creatives [...] In fact, I am actively recommending people NOT work with them because I'm still waiting for the refund I had to fight for 2 weeks ago and they were unapologetic, unhelpful and predatory.

#### What needs improvement

Be ethical. Fix your email communication system. Follow your own policies. Don't be a predator.

Fernando Monfort

#### What needs improvement

Report

 3 views [...] Based on 14 reviews

Review Milanote?

Reviewers see Milanote as a strong fit for creative work because its freeform canvas makes it easy to arrange ideas, images, notes, links, files, and references in one place. People repeatedly praise the intuitive drag-and-drop setup, useful templates, and how well it supports mood boards, brand work, research, planning, and ideation. The main complaint is mobile: several users say it works mostly as a limited companion app, with weak canvas viewing and little real editing, so desktop is where Milanote feels most useful.

Pros

visual organization(7) [...] Milanote is one of those rare tools that just clicks with how creative people actually think. Instead of forcing you into rigid lists or spreadsheets, it gives you a freeform canvas where you can organize ideas visually — mood boards, project briefs, brainstorms, everything in one place. I use it daily and honestly can't imagine my workflow without it. The drag-and-drop interface is incredibly intuitive, and the ability to mix notes, images, links, and files on the same board is a game changer. Really looking forward to seeing what the team ships next — this tool deserves way more attention. Keep building!

results.title: Canva Reviews (2026) | Product Hunt
results.content:
#### What needs improvement

If you've got a lot of projects running it can get messy really fast, especially in teams - when you remove someone from team, you can transfer their designs to another person, but if they didn't have their folders organized... prepare for chaos.

Dhwani Aggarwal

#### What's great

I have been using Canva for my presentations and creatives for some time now. I love the number of templates it has and how easy it is to customize each template. The measurements and gridlines also make alignment a breeze.

#### What needs improvement

The magic write and the photo generator using prompt gives very inaccurate results. I prefer using a separate AI for such images or content.

Shubhangi Goyal

#### What's great [...] For me, Canva stands out because it saves time while still letting you stay creative — that balance is rare. I use it regularly for designing visuals and layouts that inspire my own project, GiftWeGo.com, where users create and personalize digital gift cards. Canva sets a great example of how simplicity and creativity can work hand in hand.

Asadullah Nadeem

#### What's great

Canva is fantastic because its user-friendly interface and vast template library make professional design accessible to everyone. The drag-and-drop tools and AI features ensure a fast, seamless creative process.

#### What needs improvement [...] Shubhangi Goyal

#### What's great

I have been using Canva for more than 5 years. It is a very easy-to-use design tool, especially for people who don’t have a professional design background. The interface is simple, the templates are useful, and it helps create polished designs quickly. I’ve used it for social media posts, presentations, posters, invitations, and marketing creatives. The drag-and-drop editor makes editing text, images, colours, and layouts smooth and fast.
